## Summary

Describe the change in 2-5 sentences.

## Why this change

Explain the problem this PR solves or the improvement it introduces.

## Change type

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Workflow definition
- [ ] Skill definition
- [ ] Eval dataset
- [ ] Eval schema or policy
- [ ] Tooling or scripts
- [ ] Community or repository process

## Validation

Describe what you ran, checked, or reviewed.

- [ ] I ran relevant tests
- [ ] I ran relevant evals
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior changed
- [ ] I did not run some checks, and I explained why below

Validation notes:

## Risk review

Call out any elevated risk here.

- [ ] No known elevated risk
- [ ] This touches auth, billing, permissions, secrets, workflow side effects, or security-sensitive behavior
- [ ] This changes output schemas, policies, or eval expectations
- [ ] This changes contributor-facing repo behavior

Risk notes:

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped and reviewable
- [ ] The intent of the change is clear
- [ ] The diff avoids unrelated cleanup
- [ ] Any new examples avoid secrets and unsafe defaults
- [ ] Community-facing language is clear and respectful
